sys_ui_page.description: New UI Page to prompt from Platform about updating OU and changing the Tasker Number values for tasks
sys_ui_page.html:
var styleSheets = []; styleSheets.push("tasker-modal-prompt-UIPages.css"); var linkTags = []; for (var sheet in styleSheets) { var css = new GlideRecord("content_css"); css.addQuery("name", styleSheets[sheet]); css.query(); css.next(); linkTags.push(css.sys_id+".cssdbx?ver="+css.sys_updated_on); } cancel Tasker - Button - Update Warning Tasker - You are about to update the OU Abbreviation Tasker - OU Abbreviation is referenced in Tasker Number Tasker - Please choose which existing tasks to update Tasker - Only Active Tasks in the OU ({0} tasks will be updated) Tasker - Active and Closed Tasks in the OU ({0} tasks will be updated) Tasker - Only on New Tasks var messageActiveTasksCount = ''; var activeTasksInOU = 0; var taskerHelpers = new TaskerHelpers(); activeTasksInOU = taskerHelpers.countTasksInOU(jelly.jvar_ou_id, true); messActiveTasksCount = gs.getMessage('Tasker - Only Active Tasks in the OU ({0} tasks will be updated)', [activeTasksInOU]); var messageAllTasksCount = ''; var allTasksInOU = 0; var taskerHelpers = new TaskerHelpers(); allTasksInOU = taskerHelpers.countTasksInOU(jelly.jvar_ou_id, false); messAllTasksCount = gs.getMessage('Tasker - Active and Closed Tasks in the OU ({0} tasks will be updated)', [allTasksInOU]);

${gs.getMessage('Warning')}!


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - You are about to update the OU Abbreviation')}


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - OU Abbreviation is referenced in Tasker Number')}




${gs.getMessage('cancel')} ${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Button - Update')}
sys_ui_page.name: tasker_org_abbreviation_change_prompt
